const evidence = collectGovernanceEvidence({ selectedItem, projectData, governanceData });

${!hasEvidence ? `
Missing source evidence — attach Library proof before high-risk approval.
` : ""}

return "Submit reviewed Governance decision? This records a backend reviewed decision and may update linked queues or review state. It does not publish or execute directly.";

<small class="mhos-executive-metric-note governance-ai-boundary-note">AI cannot approve or change policy. Human backend decision required.</small>
<button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" data-governance-focus="all">View Full Queue</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" data-governance-open-ai>Ask AI for Guidance</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" data-governance-action="refresh">Refresh Governance Data</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" data-governance-open-ai>Open AI Context</button>
${renderFlagList(asArray(sections.policy_violations), "No policy violations are currently open.", escapeHtml)}

Settings bridge: ${escapeHtml(settingsBridge.source || "Not synced")} • approval mode ${escapeHtml(settingsBridge.approval_mode || "unknown")} • claim mode ${escapeHtml(settingsBridge.claim_safety_mode || "unknown")} • synced ${escapeHtml(settingsBridge.synced_at ? formatDateTime(settingsBridge.synced_at) : "not yet")}
Inspect risk, owner, status, and decision focus.

: `
No governance items are visible in this focus state.
`}
${escapeHtml(selectedItem ? "Review risk, owner, evidence, and linked approval before decision." : "Choose a governance item from the queue to inspect it.")}

Authority focus: ${escapeHtml(selectedItem.queue_owner || authorityOwner)} owns this ${escapeHtml(titleCase(selectedItem.queue_risk || "medium"))} ${escapeHtml(titleCase(selectedItem.queue_kind || "governance"))} review.
${renderFlagList(asArray(selectedItem.queue_flags), "No policy flags were attached to this item.", escapeHtml)}
Backend-authoritative decisions only. Approval actions mutate durable approval records and appear only for real queued approvals.

Authority boundary: Governance records reviewed backend decisions and policy gates. It does not publish, send, or execute directly. High-risk decisions require confirmation, evidence review, and backend authority remains enforced.
Safe execution path: Review selected context, verify evidence, add rationale, submit one reviewed Governance decision, then refresh and validate queue impact.

<textarea id="governanceDecisionNote" class="setup-input setup-textarea governance-note" rows="4" placeholder="Add a decision reason, change request, or escalation note.">${escapeHtml(selectedItem?.decision_note || "")}</textarea>
<button class="btn btn-primary" type="button" data-governance-action="save-policy">Save Backend Governance Policy</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" data-governance-action="sync-settings"${Object.keys(settingsDraft).length ? "" : " disabled"}>Review & Sync Settings-Derived Rules</button>
<button class="btn btn-primary" type="button" data-governance-decision="approved" data-approval-id="${escapeHtml(selectedItem.id)}">Submit Reviewed Approval</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" data-governance-decision="rejected" data-approval-id="${escapeHtml(selectedItem.id)}">Submit Rejection Decision</button>
<button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" data-governance-decision="overridden" data-approval-id="${escapeHtml(selectedItem.id)}">Record High-Risk Override</button>
Explanation-only guidance. AI cannot approve, override, or change policy; backend decisions stay in governed controls.
AI guidance scope: Policy pressure, approval readiness, ownership coverage, risk, and next governance move.
<button class="btn btn-secondary" type="button" data-governance-open-ai>Open AI: Review in AI Workspace</button>
context.showMessage("Approval request added to the governance queue.");

const confirmed = window.confirm("Confirm backend Governance policy save

Action: Save durable Governance policy rules for this project.
Risk: These rules can affect approvals, publishing readiness, brand safety review, admin override behavior, and freeze-publishing behavior.
Authority: This is a backend-governed durable policy update.

Select Cancel to review the policy settings before saving.");
context.showError("No durable Settings snapshot was found in the governance bridge for this project.");

const confirmed = window.confirm("Sync Settings-derived rules to Governance policy? This updates durable Governance rules including approval-before-publish, claim review, escalation, owners, override behavior, and policy behavior. Continue only if the Settings snapshot was reviewed.");
context.showMessage("Settings-derived rules synced into durable Governance policy.");
context.showError(error.message || "Failed to sync Settings into Governance.");
context.showMessage?.("Governance prompt added to AI Command.");
description: "Review backend approvals, policy violations, overrides, escalation, publishing gates, and audit visibility across content, media, campaigns, and publishing."
